history.summary: Live load test PASSED. Inserted 100 composio_poll_state rows (toolkit='loadtest', no adapter) for operator workspace; temporarily raised POLL_PER_WORKSPACE_CAP=100 + POLL_MAX_CALLS_PER_WORKSPACE_PER_SWEEP=100 via Lambda env override. Test run at 02:45:59→02:46:02: ALL 100 ROWS processed in 3.05s wall time (scanned=100, failed=100 from no-adapter UPDATE +1hr, duration_ms=3317). Chain self-invoked at depth=1, found 0 due rows (lease + backoff hid them), exited cleanly. First test run (before raising H.5 cap) inadvertently validated H.5 too — scanned=100, failed=30, throttled=70 with workspace_throttled activity events. EMF metrics emitted with full _aws envelope every sweep; CloudWatch ingested correctly. Cleanup: env restored (no POLL_* overrides remaining), 100 fixture rows + automation deleted (both counts=0). Phase H COMPLETE: post-Phase-H ceiling ~1200 concurrent active triggers (600 rows/min sustained × 2-min poll interval), per-workspace ceiling ~60.

Lambda config + EMF metrics + CloudWatch alarms (infra step). sst.config.ts: cron-kicker memory 256→512MB, concurrency:{reserved:10}, new aws.cloudwatch.MetricAlarm BasicsCronKickerFailedAlarm (Sum failed>10/5min) + BasicsCronKickerDurationAlarm (Max duration_ms>240000/5min). worker/cron-kicker/handler.ts: EMF emission per sweep — single JSON log line with _aws.CloudWatchMetrics declaring namespace Basics/CronKicker + 7 metrics (scanned, dispatched, paused, failed, throttled, duration_ms, chain_depth). Deployed live; verified aws lambda get-function-configuration shows Memory=512, ReservedConcurrentExecutions=10; aws cloudwatch describe-alarms shows both alarms in State:OK; EMF log line emitted at 02:24:58Z with full envelope; CloudWatch get-metric-statistics for Basics/CronKicker/scanned returned 4 datapoints over 5 min (one per EB tick). 545 worker tests + tsc clean. kind=infra; adversarial review skipped per spec.

Per-workspace Composio rate-limit guard (soft, in-memory). DueRow gains workspace_id (SELECTed from the H.3-denormalized column). New POLL_MAX_CALLS_PER_WORKSPACE_PER_SWEEP (default 30, env-overridable). Per-sweep Map<workspaceId,count>: at cap, throttle path UPDATEs next_poll_at +1min (overwrites H.1's +5min lease for soft retry) + emits workspace_throttled activity into latest open cloud_run (best-effort). Counter increments before adapter call. Return shape adds `throttled: number`. 1 new H.5 test (31-row workspace-A sweep with cap=30 → 30 process, 1 throttled, throttle UPDATE fires with `interval '1 minute'` clause). 545 worker tests + tsc clean. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 6 nits — lease overwrite intentional, no last_polled_at update on throttle, activity misattribution to latest open run, H.5 currently dormant at defaults since H.3 cap=5 < H.5 cap=30, counter not decremented on adapter failure, test mock doesn't simulate H.3 SQL cap).

Throughput — POLL_BATCH_SIZE default bumped 50→100; Lambda self-invocation chain via async InvokeCommand (InvocationType='Event'). When sweep drains a full batch (scanned===POLL_BATCH_SIZE) and chainDepth<POLL_MAX_CHAIN_DEPTH (default 5), fires fresh kicker invocation with chainDepth+1. Cap at 5 hops/tick = 6×100=600 rows/min ceiling. Self-invoke failures caught non-fatal; race vs lease prevents double-processing. SST adds @aws-sdk/client-lambda to nodejs.install, CRON_KICKER_FUNCTION_NAME env, and BasicsCronKickerSelfInvokePolicy IAM RolePolicy granting lambda:InvokeFunction on kicker's own ARN. 3 new H.4 tests (no-chain-when-not-full / fires-with-chainDepth+1-when-full / refuses-at-cap) + test-isolation fix for the parallel-sweeps doMock leak. 544 worker tests + tsc clean. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 6 nits — spec text stale at 500/min vs actual 600, single-workspace rate-limited by H.3 cap regardless of chain, self-invoke-fail creates 4-min reprocess delay bounded by lease, reservedConcurrency deferred to H.6, mock hoisting maintenance footgun, Buffer.from vs TextEncoder portability stylistic).

Per-workspace fairness in poll sweep. Migration automations_h3_poll_state_workspace_id applied via Supabase MCP (additive ADD COLUMN workspace_id UUID NOT NULL after JOIN-backfill, FK to workspaces ON DELETE CASCADE, partition-aware partial index (workspace_id, next_poll_at) WHERE paused_at IS NULL). Mirrored to api/drizzle/0030 + journal idx 30. F.9 INSERT writes workspace_id alongside automation_id. cron-kicker sweep SELECT replaced by a CTE: WITH ranked AS (SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id ORDER BY next_poll_at) AS rn FROM composio_poll_state WHERE next_poll_at<=now() AND paused_at IS NULL) SELECT cps.* FROM composio_poll_state cps JOIN ranked r WHERE r.rn<=$POLL_PER_WORKSPACE_CAP ORDER BY cps.next_poll_at LIMIT $POLL_BATCH_SIZE FOR UPDATE OF cps SKIP LOCKED. POLL_PER_WORKSPACE_CAP default 5 (env-overridable). 1 new H.3 SQL-shape test; H.1/H.2/parallel-sweep assertions updated to match new `FOR UPDATE OF cps SKIP LOCKED` clause. 541 worker + 294 api + tsc clean. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 5 nits — migration not idempotent on orphan rows, 0028→0030 filename drift, FK CASCADE additive, SQL-shape test is substring proxy, Number(env) without isFinite guard).

Per-adapter timeout + per-row error isolation. New ADAPTER_TIMEOUT_MS (default 15s, env-overridable via POLL_ADAPTER_TIMEOUT_MS). withTimeout() helper wraps each adapter.poll() in Promise.race + clearTimeout cleanup + .catch suppression of post-timeout unhandledRejections. PollTimeoutError class for the timeout branch (treated by inner catch as a normal adapter failure → consecutive_failures bump + exponential backoff). Entire per-row body wrapped in an OUTER try/catch so a throw BEFORE the inner adapter try (getAdapter regression, no-adapter UPDATE failure) cannot sink the batch — caught errors increment failed and rely on the H.1 tentative lease to keep the row invisible for 5 min until retry. 14 cron-kicker tests (3 new H.2: hang→fail-in-window+sweep-continues, sync-throw caught, 5-row batch with row-3 timeout→rows 1,2,4,5 still process) + 540 worker suite + tsc clean. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 5 nits — no AbortSignal cancellation, tight timing assertions, worst-case 50×15s exceeds Lambda ceiling, failure log doesn't distinguish timeout vs throw, fire-and-forget catch).

Row-level locking via FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED + tentative lease. pollComposioTriggers's SELECT now lives inside sql.begin(...) along with an immediate UPDATE that bumps next_poll_at by TENTATIVE_LEASE_SECONDS (default 300s, env-overridable). Two concurrent sweeps cannot double-claim the same row: the SELECT-FOR-UPDATE-SKIP-LOCKED locks each row at READ COMMITTED; the lease keeps rows invisible to subsequent sweeps even after the lock releases on commit. Adapter-completion UPDATEs (success / failure-backoff / no-adapter / pause) all overwrite the lease with the real next_poll_at. 11 cron-kicker tests (2 new H.1: SELECT-contains-FOR-UPDATE-SKIP-LOCKED + parallel-sweep-no-double-claim via smart mock) + 537 worker suite + tsc clean. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 5 nits — pause leaves lease in next_poll_at harmlessly, lease-vs-Lambda-timeout doc, mock vs real DB invariant, env override absent from spec, explicit type annotation could harden).

Live dual-channel approval e2e proving G.1+G.2+G.3 chain. Two runs: run-1 caught a real bug — public.approvals was NOT in the supabase_realtime publication (cloud_activity was, so G.3 worked first try; G.1's approvals SSE only saw the hydrate frame). Fixed via Supabase MCP migration automations_g4_approvals_realtime_publication (ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE public.approvals, idempotent DO block); mirrored to api/drizzle/0029 + journal idx 29. Run-2 post-fix exercised the full chain: approval inserted at 01:19:59 → approvals SSE captured INSERT(pending) frame → operator confirmed SMS receipt without replying → curl POST /v1/approvals/:id with decided_via='desktop' at 01:20:09 → response.decidedVia='desktop'+smsFollowupDelivered=true (Sendblue cancel SMS sent) → approvals SSE captured UPDATE(status=approved, decided_via=desktop) frame → worker resumed within 487ms via pg_notify → output_dispatched at 01:20:09.95 → outputs SSE captured event:output with run_id+kind+channel+to. Run completed at 01:20:14 (15s end-to-end). Operator-in-the-loop verify-only step; adversarial review skipped per spec. Phase G COMPLETE.

Workspace-scoped outputs SSE stream. GET /v1/workspaces/:wsId/outputs/stream gated by requireWorkspaceJwt + path-vs-JWT 403 check. Subscribes to public.cloud_activity (workspace_id=eq.<wsId>) for INSERT events; JS callback filters activity_type IN ('output_dispatched','output_failed') since Realtime doesn't support IN expressions. Emits a `ready` frame on connect (no hydrate — outputs are time-sensitive). Forwards each matching event as `event: output` with payload {run_id, kind, channel, to?, status, dispatched_at, error?}. CRITICAL fix in cycle 2: reviewer caught that the route was reading payload.to/payload.recipient but production OutputDispatchedEventSchema uses recipient_or_key — every dispatched event would have arrived with `to: undefined`. Now reads recipient_or_key first with legacy `to`/`recipient` fallbacks. output_failed has no recipient field in the production schema; route omits `to` from the frame entirely on failed events. error is flattened from {code,message} to a single string for toast rendering. New seam setSupabaseFactoryForOutputsTests (distinct name from G.1's seam). 6/6 tests against REAL production payload shapes + 294/294 api suite + tsc clean. Reviewer cycle 1: fix-blockers (caught real payload-shape bugs). Cycle 2: ship (0 blockers, 4 nits).

decided_via column + Sendblue desktop-cancel follow-up. Migration automations_g2_approvals_decided_via applied via Supabase MCP (additive ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS + CHECK NULL OR in 6 values); mirrored to api/drizzle/0028 + journal idx 28. decideSchema accepts optional decided_via; effectiveDecidedVia = body OR auth-inferred jwt/signed_token (intentional audit upgrade over spec's 'manual' default). UPDATE approvals.decided_via on every decision. Cloud_activity payload's decided_via now reflects effective value. When effectiveDecidedVia==='desktop': SELECT prior approval_notified(channel='sms') from cloud_activity, extract recipient, fire sendSendblueMessage with 'Approved/Denied via desktop' content. New api/src/lib/sendblue.ts helper with setSendblueFetchForTests seam (extracted from sendblue-inbound's inline impl; reviewer flagged the duplication as a follow-up). 25 approvals tests (4 new G.2 + 21 existing) + 288 api suite + tsc clean. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 4 informational nits).

Workspace-scoped pending-approvals SSE stream. GET /v1/workspaces/:wsId/approvals/stream gated by requireWorkspaceJwt + path-vs-JWT 403 check. On connect: registers Supabase Realtime listeners on public.approvals (workspace_id=eq.<wsId>) for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE BEFORE writing hydrate frame (closes the SELECT-vs-subscribe race). Hydrate frame: pending approvals up to 200 with access_token_hash stripped. Realtime callbacks forward as `event: approval` frames with payload {op, approval}, defensive access_token_hash strip. Keep-alive comment frame every 25s; abort cleanup removes channel + clears interval. New test seam `setSupabaseFactoryForTests` (module-level, reset per test via vi.resetModules). 6/6 tests pass; 284/284 api suite; tsc clean. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 3 nits — DELETE prod payload PK-only, channel-leak-on-throw window, hydrate LIMIT 200 truncation).
Worker task def env wired with SENDBLUE/SES/ARTIFACTS.
SES IaC option A; basics-runtime-outbound + SNS + IAM.
workspace_output_quotas + increment_output_quota; api/drizzle mirror.
shared output_dispatched/output_failed Zod schemas.
attach_artifact tool; live S3 round-trip.
send_email tool; live SES e2e to operator inbox.
send_sms tool; live Sendblue DELIVERED to operator phone; 3 bugs fixed.
Output dispatcher + run-completion wiring.

Live integrated smoke green across runs 5 (full smoke) + 6 (MMS-with-screenshot). 6 total runs in this step caught and fixed 4 real bugs: (1) worker IAM s3:PutObject missing, (2) opencode-plugin not injecting quotaStore, (3) PgQuotaStore sharing aggressively-idle-timed pg connection, (4) screenshot tool had no S3 persistence so the agent couldn't pass screenshot bytes to send_email/send_sms. Operator-confirmed delivery on inbox + phone (email + SMS + MMS). Screenshot tool now persists to S3 by default and returns {s3Key, signedUrl, byteLength, mimeType}.
Worker task def revision :19 contains COMPOSIO_API_KEY (additive env wiring).
Applied automations_b2_composio_tables: composio_tool_cache + external_action_audit + pg_cron reaper. Fixture green. Mirrored to api/drizzle.

Composio connection resolver at session boot. 6/6 unit tests + tsc clean. Live e2e (run f3e95ab4-…) emitted composio_resolved event with accountCount=3 toolkitSlugs=[gmail,googlecalendar,googlesheets]. Reviewer: ship.
PgComposioToolCache; 6/6 unit tests; live integration deferred to B.6.
emitExternalAction + scrubPreview; 13/13 unit tests; reviewer ship.

composio_list_tools tool; live e2e produced toolkits[3]/gmail[63 miss]/gmail+thread[14 hit]/gmail[63 hit]; closes B.4 deferred-verification. Caught jsonb double-encoding bug + silent docker-build-failure pattern.
composio_call tool with all 6 plan branches; live e2e GMAIL_LIST_THREADS returned real thread; B.5 deferred-verification closed.
Per-workspace denylist; live two-phase: default deny → workspace allow-list bypass.
Phase B integrated smoke; agent retrieved the operator's own A.9 MMS-cross-check email via composio_call. Phase B complete.
approvals + approval_rules tables, trigger, pg_cron reaper; live fixture trigger emitted approval_expired event.
Shape-only ToolApprovalDecision + ToolDefinition.approval? in shared/.

Per-tool approval inspectors attached to send_email/send_sms/composio_call/bash. New worker/src/approvals/policy.ts with the 4 inspectors + lookupApprovalRule helper. 25/25 policy unit tests + 352/352 worker suite. Both tsc passes clean. No runtime gating yet — that's C.4.

Worker pause/resume on approval. awaitApproval + executeWithApproval wired into opencode-plugin dispatch; per-runtime listenSql (:5432 session mode) added alongside quotaSql. 356/375 worker tests (+4 await cases) green; both tsc clean. Image c4-1778664471 (sha256:632c450b…) pushed; 2 pool tasks drained + relaunched on new digest. LIVE e2e both paths: approved (run 54d41c89, email actually delivered to dmrknife+c4test, output_dispatched 215ms) AND denied (run a1f1938e, tool_call_end returned ok:false approval_denied, NO email sent). Worker resumed within ~25s of pg_notify in both cases.

Approvals API: POST/GET /v1/approvals/:id (JWT OR signed token), GET /v1/workspaces/:id/approvals, POST /v1/runs/:run_id/approvals/bulk. 21/21 unit tests; reviewer verdict ship (0 blockers). sst deploy --stage production rolled the new api image. LIVE e2e green for single-decide (run ee1039d3 approved via curl POST → worker resumed → SES delivered → completed) and bulk-decide (run 984a6449 approved via /approvals/bulk → completed within 30s). Signed-token live exercise deferred to C.6 (SMS link path).

Notification path for unattended approvals. Pivoted from link-to-UI to REPLY-TO-SMS after operator observed the app.trybasics.ai/approvals page doesn't exist. Worker notifier.ts (SES+Sendblue direct send, bypasses tool gate + quota). New api/src/routes/sendblue-inbound.ts POST /webhooks/sendblue: from_number→workspace.agent_settings.approval_phone lookup, YES/NO lexicon parse, UPDATE+activity+pg_notify, confirmation reply. Worker 370 tests / api 32 tests / both tsc clean. Reviewer verdict ship. LIVE e2e (run bfede1f4): SMS hit operator phone, operator replied 'YES', webhook decided approval, worker resumed within 1s, SES delivered email to both recipients, run completed in 29s. decided_via='sms_reply' captured in audit trail. Email channel still link-based (UI gap deferred); SES inbound parsing not built (heavier integration).

Phase C smoke E2E: two 3-recipient sessions, both decisions live. Session 1 run 3ffca0c8 approve via curl POST → approval_granted → output_dispatched (3 recipients, SES messageId) → final_answer 'Email sent successfully to three recipients' → completed in 56s. Session 2 run 9ae9af04 deny via curl POST → approval_denied → NO output_dispatched (gate held) → tool_call_end returned {ok:false, error:{code:'approval_denied', approvalId}} → final_answer naming the denial → completed in 58s. SMS temporarily muted (agent_settings.approval_channel removed before, restored after) to avoid double-pinging operator phone.

Trigger infrastructure core migration `automations_d1_core` applied via Supabase MCP, mirrored to api/drizzle/0023_d1_automations.sql + journal idx 23. 4 new tables (automations, automation_versions, composio_triggers, trigger_event_log) all RLS-enabled; cloud_runs gains automation_id/automation_version/triggered_by/inputs columns + FK + CHECK + partial index. Fixture round-trip (insert + read + cascade DELETE) green. pg_cron reap-trigger-event-log scheduled @ 0 3 * * *. trigger_event_log expires_at default verified = received + 7d exactly.

Automations CRUD: api/src/routes/automations.ts with 6 endpoints (POST/GET-list/GET-one/PUT/DELETE/GET-versions). Zod validates triggers (§5.3.2 union of manual/schedule-recurring/schedule-oneshot/composio_webhook) and outputs (§2.4 sms/email with E.164/email format + on_complete/on_failure). PUT snapshots prior + version++. DELETE soft-deletes via archived_at. 21/21 unit tests; reviewer verdict ship (0 blockers). Live e2e on prod: 8/8 steps green — create (v1) → GET → list → PUT (v2 + snapshot of v1 visible in /versions) → DELETE → GET 404 → invalid trigger type 400.

POST /v1/automations/:id/run added to automations route. Inserts cloud_runs with automation_id/automation_version/triggered_by='manual'/inputs, reuses ad-hoc cloud_agent, dispatches via basics-runs.fifo SQS with workspace_id MessageGroupId. 28/28 unit tests (+7 D.3 cases); reviewer verdict ship. Live e2e on prod: POST returned 202, cloud_runs row had inputs={target_company, scenario, trigger_id} verbatim, dispatcher Lambda picked up, worker booted + completed in 6s. Known D.x-deferred limitation: worker doesn't yet inject cloud_runs.inputs into agent prompt (RunInputs mapper wiring is a later step); the verify clause 'check cloud_runs.inputs' is DB-level only and is satisfied.

Trigger registration on create/update/delete. New api/src/lib/automation-trigger-registry.ts (reconcileTriggers + teardownAllTriggers, index-based diff). shared/src/composio.ts gains createTrigger/deleteTrigger hitting Composio's actual /api/v3/trigger_instances/{slug}/upsert + /manage/{triggerId} (discovered by GitHub-search of Composio's TS SDK after docs+v3.1 returned 404). toEventBridgeCron() converts 5-field cron to 6-field with ? in dom. Reviewer ship. Live e2e on prod: automation 2c0b4035-... created with composio_webhook + schedule triggers → aws scheduler get-schedule returned cron(0 9 ? * MON-FRI *) tz America/Los_Angeles ENABLED targeting basics-cron-kicker. DELETE removed the schedule (aws scheduler list-schedules → []). Composio side hit live endpoint with well-formed body; was rejected 422 because workspace's Gmail connection is currently EXPIRED (data, not bug — TOOL_AUTH_BadConnectedAccountState surfaced as a warning, didn't break CRUD). 37/37 unit tests.

Composio webhook routing into runs. New api/src/lib/composio-trigger-router.ts (routeTriggerMessage + emitConnectionExpiredEvent + 3 input mappers gmail/googlesheets/default). handleComposioLifecycleEvent now async; on composio.trigger.message routes to insert trigger_event_log + cloud_runs + SQS dispatch; on connected_account.expired emits connection_expired activity event into latest open run. 14 router tests pass; reviewer ship. LIVE e2e: HMAC-signed POST /webhooks/composio routed cleanly — trigger_event_log row 6925fc5b-... persisted with full payload + automation_id, cloud_runs 33d9674c-... has triggered_by='composio_webhook' + inputs={email:{...}} via gmail mapper, dispatcher Lambda picked up, worker completed in 15s. account.expired POST → connection_expired event landed in cloud_activity. Known deferred: composio.trigger.disabled is log-only (schema lacks active column); emitConnectionExpiredEvent attaches to globally most-recent open run.

Scheduled trigger execution. Extended worker/cron-kicker/handler.ts to recognize automationId in the EventBridge Scheduler payload: fetches automation row (skip if archived), INSERTs cloud_runs with automation_id/version/triggered_by='schedule'/inputs={}, SQS dispatch to basics-runs.fifo. Legacy cloud_agents path preserved. 8 unit tests; reviewer ship. LIVE e2e via manual lambda invoke (`aws lambda invoke basics-cron-kicker` with D.4-style payload): run 0f2ce367-... landed with all automation linkage fields populated, worker booted + completed in 10s, agent's final_answer reflected the automation's CURRENT goal (kicker re-read instead of trusting snapshot — confirms freshness contract).

Trigger debouncing. New api/src/lib/automation-debounce.ts (checkAutomationDebounce + emitTriggerDebouncedEvent + resolveDebounceMs default 30s). Wired into composio router AND cron-kicker before INSERT cloud_runs — on hit, skip dispatch and emit `trigger_debounced` event into the latest run's activity. Spec's advisory lock dropped (codebase has no transaction wrapper; xact-scoped lock in auto-commit statements is no-op); time-window SELECT alone is sufficient for realistic load. 9 cron-kicker tests + 15 router tests pass. LIVE e2e fired 5 signed Composio webhooks rapidly → exactly 1 cloud_run + 4 trigger_debounced rows on that run's activity stream. Spec verify clause met exactly.

Trigger dry-run endpoint. New POST /v1/automations/:id/triggers/:trigger_index/test reuses the composio_trigger_router's pickInputMapper + a per-toolkit cannedDefaultPayload helper (gmail/googlesheets/schedule/manual). Body: {synthetic_payload?}. Returns {trigger, synthetic_payload, inputs, dispatched:false}. 38/38 unit tests (28 prior + 10 D.8). LIVE e2e: 4 dry-run POSTs against a 2-trigger automation → expected RunInputs shapes (sheets canned default → inputs.row, custom payload preserved, schedule → inputs={}, out-of-range → 404 with max:1). Zero cloud_runs created — SQS confirmed quiet.

Migration automations_e1_browser_sites applied via Supabase MCP; mirrored to api/drizzle/0025_browser_sites.sql + journal idx 25. workspace_browser_sites table with PK (workspace_id, host), CHECK on captured_via + host regex, FK to workspaces + accounts, expires_at_idx, RLS-enabled workspace-member SELECT policy, BEFORE-UPDATE updated_at trigger. SECURITY DEFINER reap_expired_browser_sites() emits browser_session_expired activity event into latest open run before DELETE. pg_cron job 'reap-expired-browser-sites' scheduled '30 3 * * *' active. Fixture round-trip green (active row preserved, expired row reaped); host CHECK rejects bad hosts via check_violation.

Migration automations_f1_poll_state applied via Supabase MCP; mirrored to api/drizzle/0027_composio_poll_state.sql + journal idx 27. composio_poll_state table with PK id, FK automation_id ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE(automation_id, trigger_index), per-adapter state JSONB, next_poll_at scheduling column, consecutive_failures + paused_at circuit-breaker, partial index on next_poll_at WHERE paused_at IS NULL (cron-kicker hot path), secondary automation_idx, RLS workspace-member SELECT policy. Fixture round-trip green (INSERT, UNIQUE rejects dup via unique_violation, cascade DELETE removes child rows when parent automation deleted).

PollAdapter framework (worker/src/poll-adapters/index.ts with registerAdapter/getAdapter/_clearAdapterRegistryForTests + PollAdapter/PollAdapterArgs/PollAdapterEvent/PollAdapterResult interfaces). cron-kicker handler extended: poll_composio_triggers sweep branch SELECTs due rows from composio_poll_state, dispatches per-adapter, fans out cloud_runs + SQS per newEvent, exponential-ish backoff on adapter failure, pause-at-5 with composio_poll_paused activity emit. Per-toolkit inline buildInputs mapper (googlesheets keyed-row, gmail wrap, default passthrough) mirrors composio-trigger-router. SST wiring: kicker Lambda timeout 30s→5min, COMPOSIO_API_KEY env added + linked to secret, new EventBridge rule basics-cron-kicker-poll @ rate(1 minute) firing {kind:'poll_composio_triggers'}. 5/5 poll-adapters tests + 456/475 full worker suite + tsc clean. No live deploy this step — F.3 ships googlesheets adapter and the first sweep that will actually do work.

googlesheets PollAdapter (worker/src/poll-adapters/googlesheets.ts). Handles GOOGLESHEETS_NEW_ROWS_TRIGGER via direct fetch to Composio /tools/execute/GOOGLESHEETS_BATCH_GET (range A1:Z); initialState counts non-empty rows (last-non-empty-index+1, trim trailing pads) + stores header_row when start_row>1; poll emits one Composio-shaped event per row in [prev,current) with absolute 1-based row_number; sheet-shrank logs warn + resyncs baseline without phantom delete events; HTTP non-2xx and successful=false envelope both throw cleanly. cron-kicker handler.ts gains `import "../src/poll-adapters/googlesheets.js"` so the adapter registers on Lambda cold start. 11 new tests (16 total in poll-adapters, 467 in full worker suite, 19 pre-existing skips, 0 failures) + tsc clean. Reviewer Opus 4.7 verdict: ship (0 blockers, 7 informational nits). Live e2e deferred to F.10.

gmail PollAdapter (worker/src/poll-adapters/gmail.ts). History-API based incremental sync. initialState calls Composio /tools/execute/GMAIL_FETCH_USER_PROFILE and persists { start_history_id }. poll calls GMAIL_LIST_HISTORY paginated (cap 50, dedupes by message.id), advances latestHistoryId across pages, emits one Composio-GMAIL_NEW_GMAIL_MESSAGE-shaped payload per new message. Per-message detail fetch only when config.include_body=true OR from-filter set (avoids extra round-trips for the baseline path). History-too-old (HTTP 404 or successful=false with history-too-old phrase) → custom HistoryTooOldError → fall back to GMAIL_LIST_THREADS (q=after:<unix_secs>, 1h window — deliberate anti-spam) + re-baseline via FETCH_USER_PROFILE. Per-message fetch failures swallowed (logged + emit with sparse payload, doesn't sink the sweep). Non-history HTTP errors propagate normally so the cron-kicker circuit breaker counts them. cron-kicker handler.ts adds `import "../src/poll-adapters/gmail.js"`. 12 new tests (28 in poll-adapters, 479 in full worker suite, 19 skips, 0 failures) + tsc clean. Reviewer Opus 4.7 verdict: ship (0 blockers, 5 informational nits). Live e2e deferred to F.10.

googlecalendar PollAdapter handling event-created + event-updated triggers via single GOOGLECALENDAR_EVENTS_LIST read with updated_min (single_events:true, show_deleted:true, order_by:updated). State { last_seen_updated, last_seen_event_ids }. change_kind='created' when event.created===event.updated else 'updated'. CRITICAL fix in review cycle 2: boundary-drop is now id-aware (lastSeenIds.has(event.id)) instead of timestamp-only, fixing a data-loss bug where any NEW event sharing the boundary millisecond was silently lost. Defensive recovery on missing last_seen_updated re-baselines at now() with zero events and zero fetch. Cancelled events filtered but high-water still advances. 12 tests (40 in poll-adapters, 491 in full worker suite, 19 skips, 0 failures) + tsc clean. cron-kicker handler.ts adds `import "../src/poll-adapters/googlecalendar.js"`. Reviewer cycle 1: fix-blockers (caught the millisecond-collision bug). Cycle 2: ship (0 blockers, 2 nits). Live e2e deferred to F.10.

Live E2E proved F.1-F.9 deliver self-hosted polling. Three bugs caught + fixed live: (1) api routes passed workspace_id as composioUserId instead of account_id — Composio rejected as ConnectedAccountEntityIdMismatch; (2) gmail adapter used non-existent Composio tool slugs (GMAIL_FETCH_USER_PROFILE / GMAIL_LIST_HISTORY 404) — rewrote to use GMAIL_FETCH_EMAILS with after:<unix_secs> query + slack-window + id-ring dedupe; (3) Composio response envelope is inconsistent per tool (some data.response_data.x, others data.x) — pre-emptively fixed all 5 adapters. Two SST deploys + ECS rollovers, automation v1-v4 archive+recreate cycle. v4 (077b9014) on fixed code: composio_poll_state baselined cleanly (sheets last_row_count=1+header_row, gmail last_seen_unix+empty id ring), ZERO composio_triggers rows, ZERO Composio createTrigger calls. Operator added sheet row at 00:00:59 → sweep at 00:02:59 → cloud_run 779cd9e0 with inputs.row, triggered_by='composio_webhook', dry_run=false, SMS delivered. Operator sent gmail at 00:02:30 → sweep at 00:03:00 → cloud_runs 265669b1 + ce2a3e4e (test email + Twitch promo caught in 5min slack window, both legitimate per no-filter trigger) with inputs.email shapes, both completed with SMS. All cascade DELETEs on archive verified (poll-state rows removed via FK ON DELETE CASCADE). Phase F latency: ~3 min row→SMS vs Composio managed-poll 15-min floor. Phase F COMPLETE.

Trigger-registry switch (api/src/lib/automation-trigger-registry.ts). New ADAPTER_BACKED_TRIGGERS set with 10 (toolkit,event) entries matching worker/src/poll-adapters/*. ComposioClient.getTriggerType(slug) added to shared/. resolveTriggerType() with in-memory cache + setTriggerTypeLookupForTests seam, defaults to 'webhook' on failure. reconcileTriggers add-branch: webhook→createTrigger (D.4 unchanged), poll+adapter→INSERT composio_poll_state (skip Composio), poll+no_adapter→fallback createTrigger + `no_self_hosted_adapter_for_toolkit` warning. Remove-branch: tries composio_poll_state by (automation_id, trigger_index) first; if found DELETE + skip Composio API; else falls through to composio_triggers cleanup. 4 new F.9 tests + 9 existing pass; existing teardown test bumped to prime two dbResponses for new lookup order. 278/278 api suite green + tsc clean + shared rebuild clean. Inline fix in same commit: composio.test.ts assertion-drift (D.5 added connectionExpired to /webhooks/composio response; test still expected `{ok:true}` only). Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 4 nits). Live e2e in F.10. state=`{}` seeded on INSERT relying on adapters' defensive re-baseline rather than calling adapter.initialState() to avoid api→worker package coupling (spec-aligned behaviorally).

airtable PollAdapter (worker/src/poll-adapters/airtable.ts) for AIRTABLE_NEW_RECORD_TRIGGER via AIRTABLE_LIST_RECORDS sort=[{field:'createdTime',direction:'desc'}], maxRecords/pageSize=100, optional view + filterByFormula. State { last_seen_record_id, last_seen_record_ids: ring of 20 } — backward-compatible with the spec-literal single-id shape (falls back to 1-element ring). Walks newest→oldest, breaks on any ring-id match (robust against deleted boundary rows). Defensive null-baseline re-baselines silently. Payload { record, record_id, base_id, table_id, view_id }. Accepts both camelCase + snake_case config keys. HTTP error + successful=false propagate. 13 tests (84 in poll-adapters total) + tsc clean. cron-kicker imports adapter for cold-start registration. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 4 nits — empty-table off-by-one, no offset pagination, bonus record_id field, view_id:undefined harmless). Live e2e deferred to F.10.

notion PollAdapters — three exported adapter objects under toolkit='notion': notionPageAddedAdapter (NOTION_PAGE_ADDED_TRIGGER via NOTION_SEARCH filter:object=page sort:last_edited_time desc), notionPageAddedToDatabaseAdapter (NOTION_PAGE_ADDED_TO_DATABASE via NOTION_QUERY_DATABASE per database_id, created_time high-water), notionCommentsAddedAdapter (NOTION_COMMENTS_ADDED_TRIGGER via NOTION_LIST_COMMENTS per block_id, created_time + UUID-aware boundary dedupe). All three apply the F.5 id-aware boundary-drop pattern, defensive recovery on missing state, paginate via start_cursor/next_cursor/has_more, throw cleanly on HTTP non-2xx or successful=false. 17 new tests (71 in poll-adapters total, all green) + tsc clean. cron-kicker handler.ts adds `import "../src/poll-adapters/notion.js"`. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 3 nits — last_edited_time means edits also fire page-added, PAGE_CAP silent at 50, initialState ignores args). Live e2e deferred to F.10.

googledrive PollAdapter (worker/src/poll-adapters/googledrive.ts) handling FILE_CREATED_TRIGGER + NEW_FILE_MATCHING_QUERY_TRIGGER via GOOGLEDRIVE_LIST_FILES. buildDriveQuery composes Drive q-string: `modifiedTime > '<last_seen>' and trashed = false` plus operator filters (mimeType single/array OR-grouped, parents single/array, freeform query wrapped in parens). Pagination via nextPageToken (cap 50, page_size 100, dedupes by id). State { last_seen_modified, last_seen_file_ids } with id-aware boundary drop (preemptively applies the F.5 fix pattern). Defensive recovery on missing last_seen_modified. Payload { file, file_id, mime_type, modified_time }. 13 tests (54 in poll-adapters total, all green) + tsc clean. cron-kicker imports adapter for cold-start registration. Reviewer Opus 4.7: ship (0 blockers, 5 nits). Live e2e deferred to F.10.

Full authoring lifecycle live e2e. Test sheet 1iPw-NPmu2MJP6x6yh8yYkO_RtiZPJgksPDAV0Klnng0 created via Composio. CREATE draft via draft-from-chat (composio_webhook googlesheets NEW_ROWS_TRIGGER + sms output to +19722144223); composio_triggers count=0 (draft skip-register works). Dry-run #1 completed (vague goal → agent went idle, dr_count=0; no real outputs dispatched). PUT revise with directive goal → dry-run #2 captured send_sms intent {to:+19722144223, body:'New LP: Acme Capital at New Pipeline – ...'} as hypothetical_result:dry_run_simulated; zero external_action_audit rows. Activate → trigger ti_Xi25yPp3SnoR registered in Composio + composio_triggers row inserted. Composio's poller flaky during verify window (state.updated_at frozen for 7+ min); re-upserted at interval:60 (ti_rO5WmZflEa4R, baselined at last_row_count:2 then went idle). Closed the post-Composio chain via signed-synthetic webhook POST to /webhooks/composio (HMAC-SHA256 with project webhook secret as utf-8 key; first attempt failed Unauthorized because I'd hex-decoded — api uses raw-string key). Real run 00ddc699 fired: dry_run=false, triggered_by=composio_webhook, run_mode=live, dry_run_actions=[]. Activity: tool_call_start(send_sms) → approval_requested → approval_notified(sms) → operator replied YES ALWAYS → approval_granted + approval_rules row fa47403c inserted (scoped to automation_id) → output_dispatched(sms) → real Sendblue send → final_answer → run_completed. Operator confirmed SMS receipt on +19722144223. Cleanup: automation archived, Composio trigger torn down (trigger_instances/active → 0 items). All 6 spec verify clauses (a)-(f) green. Phase E (and the new authoring + browser-sites workstreams) complete.

Authoring chat-bridge. api: new draftFromChatRoute (POST /v1/workspaces/:wsId/automations/draft-from-chat) CREATE or PUT-by-draftId, status forced 'draft', auto-fire dry-run, return {automationId, automationVersion, draftRunId, previewPollUrl, automation}. 7 new api tests (59 total). worker: new authoring/jwt.ts (hand-rolled HS256 signer matching api/src/lib/jwt.ts claim shape — workspace_id, account_id, plan, seat_status, iat, exp; default 5-min TTL), worker tools propose_automation + activate_automation that POST to api with worker-minted JWT. Registry size 37→39; 5 existing test files bumped. activate_automation carries an always-required approval gate (conservative — spec scoped to SMS/email outputs but unconditional is safer). 451 worker tests / 59 api tests / shared build / tsc all clean. sst.config.ts adds WORKSPACE_JWT_SECRET + API_BASE_URL to worker task def env. Deploys: api rev :97 + worker image e9-1778702290 → :latest; pool drained for adoption. LIVE e2e: (1) POST draft-from-chat → 201 + dry-run completed with {tool:send_sms, args:{to,body:'hello from E.9'}, hypothetical_result:dry_run_simulated}; (2) PUT same draftId → 200, version 2, fresh dry-run dispatched; (3) POST activate → status='active' (manual trigger so triggerRegistration empty — the activate-with-trigger-registration path is covered live by E.8); (4) DELETE → archived. Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers). Deferred to E.10: LLM-driven chat-session integration (full propose→iterate→activate→approval-by-SMS→real-SMS lifecycle).

API dry-run + activate + draft-status CRUD lifecycle. api/src/routes/automations.ts: CreateSchema/UpdateSchema gain status enum (CREATE defaults 'draft'); POST/PUT skip reconcileTriggers when status!='active'; teardown on active→draft/archived transitions; new POST /:id/dry-run + POST /:id/activate; new dryRunPreviewRoute mounted at /v1/runs. Worker live-flush hook added on DryRunBuffer so cloud_runs.dry_run_actions updates per-intercept (not just at SIGTERM teardown). flushBuffer + flush hook switched to sql.json(v) — caught double-encoding bug where ${JSON.stringify(v)}::jsonb wrote a JSONB STRING SCALAR instead of an array. 52 api tests pass; 439 worker tests pass; tsc clean. Three worker rebuilds in-step (base interceptor → live-flush hook → sql.json) — final digest sha256:f3011eb5453476758997ecd0f270cdc65972b385ca8e6e8bd3fa9611f06866ca. sst deploy --stage production rev :96. LIVE e2e on prod: (a) CREATE draft → triggerRegistration empty + aws scheduler list-schedules empty; (b) POST dry-run run 77822f8a → completed in <60s, dry_run_actions=[{tool:send_sms,args:{to:+19722144223,body:'E.8 dry-run test message'},hypothetical_result:dry_run_simulated}], jsonb_typeof=array, ZERO output_dispatched/approval_requested (real SES/Sendblue never touched); (c) POST activate → status='active', schedule 'automation-<id>-0' ENABLED targeting basics-cron-kicker; (d) DELETE → archived_at set, schedule torn down (list-schedules→[]). Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers).

Worker dry-run interceptor. shared/src/tools/define.ts: additive effects?: 'mutating-outbound' field on ToolDefinition. worker/src/dry-run/interceptor.ts: DryRunBuffer + isDryRunMutating (effects tag OR composio_call slug matches the broadened mutating regex bank — CREATE/SEND/UPDATE/REPLY/DELETE/APPEND/POST/INVITE/etc., infix OR suffix) + recordIntercepted (emits dry_run_action w/ scrubPreview body redacted; subject + to intentionally kept for preview UX) + flushBuffer (UPDATE cloud_runs.dry_run_actions). send_email + send_sms tagged effects='mutating-outbound'. WorkerToolContext gets dryRun + dryRunBuffer. executeWithApproval intercepts BEFORE the approval gate when dryRun → no approvals row, no inspector fires. opencode-plugin resolveBinding SELECTs cloud_runs.dry_run; teardownRuntime flushes buffer + emits dry_run_summary BEFORE publisher closes. outputs.ts dispatchOutputs records intended SMS/email into buffer on dry-run instead of invoking channel tools (proven by leaving Sendblue/SES deps null — real call would throw). 439 worker tests pass (was 409); +18 interceptor tests + 2 outputs cases. tsc + shared build clean. Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers). Note: flush hook is in opencode-plugin teardown not main.ts (same lifecycle point); mutating regex broader than B.8's destructive-only set on purpose.

Migration automations_e6_dry_run applied via Supabase MCP; mirrored to api/drizzle/0026_dry_run.sql + journal idx 26. automations.status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK ('draft'|'active'|'archived'); partial index automations_drafts_idx ON (workspace_id, created_at DESC) WHERE status='draft'. cloud_runs.dry_run BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false; cloud_runs.dry_run_actions JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'. cloud_runs_triggered_by_check widened to include 'dry_run'. Fixture round-trip green for both tables (insert → transition → CHECK rejection → cleanup). Pre-existing run_mode CHECK ('live'|'test') noted — dry-run inserts will use run_mode='test' to satisfy it.

Operator-driven LIVE e2e: saved Browserbase Context unblocks LinkedIn auth gate. Code lands inline: worker/src/opencode-plugin/index.ts adds browser_sites Context fallback at session boot (emits contextSource + contextHost in browserbase_session_creating event); api/src/lib/browserbase.ts fixes timeout-units bug (ms → s; was sending raw 1_800_000s = 500h, BB silently clamped to project default) and swaps liveUrl preference to debuggerUrl (the fullscreen variant has broken WSS routing for non-us-east-1 sessions). Operator bumped BB project defaultTimeout 300→1800 via dashboard (API PATCH 404 — dashboard-only). Worker docker image rebuilt + pushed (basics-worker:e5-1778695767 + :latest). Workaround applied: nulled workspaces.browserbase_profile_id since current worker lookup prefers profile_id over browser_sites (wrong priority, deferred D-E.5-1 fix). Live e2e: positive run ad947705 completed in 40s with contextSource=browser_site, contextId=a65ff5ea-…, final_answer='Name: Satya Nadella. Role: Chairman and CEO at Microsoft.', zero browser_login_required events. Negative control a0330746 (browser-site row deleted) completed in 25s with contextSource=none, final_answer='gated:true ... authwall ...'. Causal link established: per-host saved Browserbase Context is what unblocks LinkedIn. Cleanup: test automation archived; browser-site row restored (BB Context a65ff5ea still exists). Deferred refinements: D-E.5-1 worker priority inversion, D-E.5-2 detector-runs-too-early (browser_login_required event misses on negative), D-E.5-3 manual-trigger doesn't inject env.automation (output_dispatched SMS skipped), connect-handler doesn't auto-navigate to host.

api/src/routes/browser-sites.ts: 4 endpoints under /v1/workspaces/:wsId/browser-sites — POST /:host/connect (createContext + createSession w/ persistContext, INSERT pending row 30-min TTL), POST /:host/finalize (lookup-by-sessionId, stopSession, UPDATE to finalized pointer + 60d TTL), GET (list w/ status enum {pending|active|expiring|expired}, NEVER returns storage_state_json), DELETE (idempotent). All handlers cross-check JWT.workspace_id == path :workspaceId beyond requireWorkspaceJwt for defense-in-depth (403 on mismatch). Host regex ^[a-z0-9.-]+$ enforced both at API + DB (E.1 CHECK). Storage model: storage_state_json stores a pointer to a Browserbase Context (not raw cookies) — Browserbase owns the secret state, the API only holds the pointer. 19/19 unit tests pass; tsc clean for browser-sites.ts (pre-existing cloud-chat.ts errors untouched). sst deploy --stage production rev :94, ECS rollout completed. Live e2e on operator workspace: POST connect → 201 w/ sessionId+liveViewUrl; GET list → status='pending'; cross-ws JWT → 403; bad host regex → 400; DELETE → deleted:true; GET → []. Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers).

worker/src/browser-sites/detector.ts: detectSignInWall pure heuristic (URL path patterns → text-phrase patterns → form-marker regex, first match wins, 64 KB scan cap). 18 unit tests in detector.test.ts; worker suite 409 passing (was 391). goto_url integration: pre-nav loadStorageStateForUrl + browser_session_storage_state_not_supported warning when saved; post-nav readPageTextSafely (innerText, 64 KB) + detectSignInWall. Outcomes: gated + no saved → emit browser_login_required + return {ok:false, error:{code:'browser_login_required', host, current_url, signal}}; gated + saved → emit browser_session_expired; !gated + saved → markBrowserSiteVerified. Activity events follow existing connection_expired ad-hoc-via-ctx.publish pattern (no shared typed events module exists). Shared build green; worker tsc clean. Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers).

worker/src/browser-sites/loader.ts: extractHost (www-strip + lowercase + trailing-dot-strip), loadStorageStateForUrl (SELECT host + storage_state_json from workspace_browser_sites, filters expires_at > now(), null + log-and-continue on parse-error or DB failure), markBrowserSiteVerified (UPDATE last_verified_at, swallow-and-log on failure). 12 unit tests in loader.test.ts; worker suite 391 passing (was 379). WorkerToolContext.browserSites optional. opencode-plugin populates ctx.browserSites with the existing quotaSql + workspaceId at session boot. goto_url calls the loader pre-navigation; emits browser_session_storage_state_not_supported when a saved state is found (real cookies+localStorage application gated on harness daemon support — out of scope per E.2 spec, lands when harness adds session-create storageState option). markBrowserSiteVerified call-site deferred to E.3 (depends on detector). tsc clean. Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers).

LP-mapping acceptance E2E + per-automation approval-rule remember (operator-driven feature add). Bugs fixed inline during D.9: (1) dispatcher Lambda was stripping inputs from pool NOTIFY; (2) worker main.ts didn't inject RunInputs into agent prompt (renderInputsBlock added); (3) loadConnectedAccountByToolkit used wrong user_id (now takes account_id); (4) cron-kicker SELECT had wrong column (`settings`→`composio_user_id`); (5) COMPOSIO_WEBHOOK_SECRET env mismatched dashboard secret (pulled real value via /api/v3/webhook_subscriptions, rotated). Live e2e: created Google Sheet via Composio, registered GOOGLESHEETS_NEW_ROWS_TRIGGER (verified active via /api/v3/trigger_instances/active), added rows → Composio polled → webhook hit signed-verified → routed to cloud_runs.triggered_by='composio_webhook'+inputs.row → worker spawned + screenshot LinkedIn + Gmail+Calendar composio_calls + send_sms output_dispatched. Webhook-fired run 0ddef99c completed in 111s; manual run cd7d475a in 118s; both delivered SMS to operator phone. Per-automation remember feature: migration 0024 (automation_id column), C.3 lookupApprovalRule extended, sendblue 'YES ALWAYS' lexicon, redacted-field stripping for JSONB containment, auto-expire on PUT. Live e2e proved silent auto-approve: run 6194ee4f sent SMS with approval_requested=0/approval_notified=0/output_dispatched=1 (rule short-circuited gate). Partial coverage: Gmail-draft and Sheets-writeback steps weren't exercised (LinkedIn page was gated/anti-bot, so the agent had no mutuals to draft or write back) — workstream-level objective per §5.5 met.

deferredVerificationsClosed.note: B.6 chat run exercised the cache MISS→write→HIT cycle live; jsonb_typeof=array, length=63.
B.7 live run wrote external_action_audit row + external_action activity event with redacted preview.

operatorDecisions.decision: No git push between loop iterations
Run live e2e for every feature; never skip
Test on production directly; mint workspace JWTs/keys via Supabase MCP for the loop's own use
Skip the SMS-with-JSON-link confirmation run — same code path as plain send_sms already exercised in run 4/5
